Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pori Vaithu, the singers express deep emotions of love and loss, reflecting the turmoil of a heart that struggles to let go. The song plays a significant role in Kuttram 23, enhancing the narrative of heartbreak and longing. The lyrics convey a sense of vulnerability, making it relatable to anyone who has faced similar feelings. With its haunting melody and heartfelt delivery, the song evokes a bittersweet nostalgia that lingers long after it ends.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pori Vaithu from the movie Kuttram 23 beautifully captures the essence of heartbreak and longing. With the soulful voices of Shweta Mohan and Vijay Prakash, this duet resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love's complexities. The poignant lyrics by Viveka, combined with Vishal Chandrasekar's evocative music, create an unforgettable listening experience.
stanzaMeanings: I have captured the essence of a woman who can take control.
There is no mercy even in the depths; I have firmly held onto my heart.
My pride has turned into a whirlwind that cannot be contained.
To start anew, I have placed my life on the line.
Like a storm, I have been caught in a whirlwind.
The sky is calling out to me.
I have captured the essence of a woman who can take control.
There is no mercy even in the depths; I have firmly held onto my heart.
If you try to fly high with a burden, you will fall.
You have raised the star that shines in the sky.
Like a strong tree, you have stood tall and then fallen like a shadow.
Even if it slips away, you have made the one who smiles feel special.
Without a moment's pause, I have come and become a constant burden.
You have made me a servant to all responsibilities.
What is coming is a question that is asking for you.
This joy that cannot be understood is sweet.
If love is to protect, then the love that protects is like a beautiful flower.
You have transformed me into a child with the family of the fallen.
Why is my time colored by dreams?
I have captured the essence of a woman who can take control.
There is no mercy even in the depths; I have firmly held onto my heart.
